name: Piquant Chocolate Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 each lemon, rind and juice, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 6 tablespoons of golden syrup into a pan.
2. Add 9 ounces of soft brown sugar to the pan with the syrup.
3. Add 2 ounces of butter to the mixture.
4. Pour in 3 fluid ounces of water.
5. Stir in 6 ounces of evaporated milk and finely grated lemon rind and juice.
6. Heat gently, stirring occasionally until the sugar has dissolved completely.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
